RuleSet.Name: src/schema/jpa/SchemaJpaTableTable.java

GenFile.Name: fileSchemaJpaTableTableJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$jpa/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$.jpa

RuleSet.GenRule: $switch IsInstanceMethod yes implJpaInstServerProc default implJpaClassServerProc$
, $implJavaAtomType$ $leadlower Name$
$switch IsInstanceMethod yes implJpaInstServerObjFunc default implJpaClassServerObjFunc$
$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$$reference RetTable Name$ $leadlower Name$( I$reference RetTable DefSchemaName$SchemaObj schemaObj$iterate Params( each implJpaServerMethodParam empty empty )$ );
$switch IsInstanceMethod yes implJpaInstServerListFunc default implJpaClassServerListFunc$

/** * Read the derived $TableName$ record instance by primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance to be read. * * @return The record instance for the specified primary key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. */ @Override public I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$$poptop Table TableName$ readDerived( I$SecSchemaName$Authorization Authorization, $ICompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey ) { final String S_ProcName = "readDerived";$implJpaTableReadSecurityChecks$ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$$poptop Table TableName$ retval = schema.getJpaHooksSchema().get$poptop Table TableName$Service().find(PKey);$implJpaTableFilterAndReturnRetval$ }
// SecScope Global means anyone can read the table any time permissionGranted = true;

$switch SecScope TenantGroup implJpaTableTenantGroupFilterRetval Tenant implJpaTableTenantFilterRetval ClusterGroup implJpaTableClusterGroupFilterRetval Cluster implJpaTableClusterFilterRetval System empty Global empty default errorUnrecognizedSecScopeInSchemaJpaTableTableDotJavaDotXml$$poptop Table tabletweak CafePostReadTableSecurityFilterRetval$ return( retval );

$switch SecScope TenantGroup implJpaTableTenantGroupFilterRetlist Tenant implJpaTableTenantFilterRetlist ClusterGroup implJpaTableClusterGroupFilterRetlist Cluster implJpaTableClusterFilterRetlist System empty Global empty default errorUnrecognizedSecScopeInSchemaJpaTableTableDotJavaDotXml$$poptop Table tabletweak CafePostReadTableSecurityFilterRetlist$$poptop SchemaDef schematweak CafePostReadSchemaSecurityFilterRetlist$ return( retlist );

$poptop Table switch SecScope TenantGroup implJpaTableTenantGroupFilterRetval Tenant implJpaTableTenantFilterRetval ClusterGroup implJpaTableClusterGroupFilterRetval Cluster implJpaTableClusterFilterRetval System empty Global empty default errorUnrecognizedSecScopeInSchemaJpaTableTableDotJavaDotXml$$poptop Table tabletweak CafePostReadTableSecurityFilterRetval$$indextweak CafePostReadIndexSecurityFilterRetval$ return( retval );

$switch SecScope TenantGroup implJpaTableTenantGroupFilterRetlist Tenant implJpaTableTenantFilterRetlist ClusterGroup implJpaTableClusterGroupFilterRetlist Cluster implJpaTableClusterFilterRetlist System empty Global empty default errorUnrecognizedSecScopeInSchemaJpaTableTableDotJavaDotXml$$poptop Table tabletweak CafePostReadTableSecurityFilterRetlist$$poptop SchemaDef schematweak CafePostReadSchemaSecurityFilterRetlist$ return( retlist );

/** * Lock the derived $TableName$ record instance by primary key. * * @param Authorization The session authorization information. * * @param PKey The primary key of the $TableName$ instance to be locked. * * @return The record instance for the specified primary key, or null if there is * no such existing key value. */ @Override public I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$$poptop Table TableName$ lockDerived( I$SecSchemaName$Authorization Authorization, $ICompactedPrimaryIndexClass$ PKey ) { final String S_ProcName = "lockDerived";$implJpaTableUpdateSecurityChecks$ I$poptop Table DefSchemaName$$poptop Table TableName$ retval = schema.getJpaHooksSchema().get$poptop Table TableName$Service().lockBy$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex Suffix$(PKey);$implJpaTableFilterAndReturnRetval$ }
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implJpaReadTableDerivedByInhIndexes default implJpaReadTableDerivedByBaseIndexes$
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable implJpaReadTableDerivedByIndexes$$iterate Index( each implJpaReadTableDerivedByNonPrimaryIndex )$
$iterate Index( each implJpaReadTableDerivedByIndex )$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes empty default implJpaReadTableDerivedByIndex$
$switch IsUnique yes implJpaReadTableDerivedByUniqueIndex default implJpaReadTableDerivedByDuplicateIndex$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes implJpaReadTableBasePrimarySuffix default Suffix$
$reference Table reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex Suffix$
find
findBy$implJpaReadTableSuffix$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implJpaReadTableRecByInhIndexes default implJpaReadTableRecByBaseIndexes$
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable implJpaReadTableRecByIndexes$$iterate Index( each implJpaReadTableRecByNonPrimaryIndex )$
$iterate Index( each implJpaReadTableRecByIndex )$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes empty default implJpaReadTableRecSPs$
$implJpaReadTableRecByIndex$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implJpaPageTableRecByInhIndexes default implJpaPageTableRecByBaseIndexes$
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable implJpaPageTableRecByIndexes$$iterate Index( each implJpaPageTableRecByNonPrimaryIndex )$
$iterate Index( each implJpaPageTableRecByIndex )$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes empty default implJpaPageTableRecSPs$
$switch InheritsPageData yes maybe_implJpaPageTableRecByIndex default empty$
$switch IsUnique yes empty default implJpaPageTableRecByDuplicateIndex$
, $implJpaColumnArg$
$implJavaAtomType$ arg$Name$
$implJavaAtomType$ arg$Name$
$reference Column implJpaColumnArg$
, $implJpaPassColumnArg$
arg$Name$
arg$Name$
$reference Column implJpaPassColumnArg$
, $implJpaOptPriorArg$
$implJavaOptAtomType$ prior$Name$
$implJavaOptAtomType$ prior$Name$
$reference Column implJpaOptPriorArg$
$switch IsUnique yes implJpaReadTableRecByUniqueIndex default implJpaReadTableRecByDuplicateIndex$
$switch IsUnique yes empty default implJpaPageTableRecByDuplicateIndex$
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes implJpaDeleteTableByInhIndexes default implJpaDeleteTableByBaseIndexes$
$iterate Index( each implJpaDeleteTableByNonPrimaryIndex empty empty )$$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable implJpaDeleteTableByInheritedIndexes$
$iterate Index( each implJpaDeleteTableBySpecialIndex empty empty )$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes empty default implJpaDeleteTableByIndex$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes implJpaDeleteTableByPrimaryIndex default implJpaDeleteTableByIndex$
, $implJpaPassKeyColumnArg$
argKey.get$reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$()
$iterate Columns( first implJpaPassKeyColumnArg each implJpaCommaPassKeyColumnArg )$
argKey
